title: Setting the record straight about my Financials

enrichment.summary: Kyle corrects a claim from a 4-year-old video where he said he earns $1,000/month, clarifying he never made that much — actual income was around $600/month (including $200/month rental income from an apartment co-owned with his brothers) and is now $300/month or less. He also defends himself against viewers and commenters who called him a 'leech on society,' arguing his content creation is a public service, and warns against oversharing finances online.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Never got $1,000/month — was ~$600 including rent, now less than $300
Rejects the label; claims he spends 18 hours a day creating content that helps society transition to utopia
Big mistake — spreads online, attracts trolls and hatred
Not a money-making operation, more of a public service
People should ask billionaire foundations for help rather than fighting each other over scraps
